_comment: EXAMPLE roster — copy to roster.json (same directory) and edit with your real team, then run `python assign.py sync --seed`. roster.json and workstreams.db are gitignored so your real team data never gets committed. Swappable roster (up to ~15). Per person: repos[] drives the discovery pass (path + active_branch to VERIFY against); projects/labels/themes augment the auto-derived profile. Set active:false to exclude from sync/match without deleting. Get linear_user_id values from `assign.py sync --seed`.

members.name: Alice
members.themes: Front-end lead. Component library, accessibility, SSR/streaming resilience, responsive layout bugs. Ships fast.

members.name: Bob
members.themes: Backend hardening. Async/event-loop hygiene, data-integrity (FK, NOT-NULL, migration drift), auth and cost guards, eval rigs.

members.name: You (owner)
members.themes: Owner/assigner. active:false so you aren't a discovery target; flip to true to include yourself.
